\\$t = [ImGuiNET.ImDrawCmd]
Write-Host 'ImDrawCmd size:' \([System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::SizeOf\(\\$t\)\)
\\$t.GetFields\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \\$_.Name }
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('C:\\Users\\tboha\\.nuget\\packages\\imgui.net\\1.91.6.1\\lib\\net8.0\\ImGui.NET.dll'\)

\\$idx2 = \\$text.IndexOf\('UserCallbackDataSize'\)
